name: PP 18K rose gold watch case
subtitle: Made of solid 18K gold with natural diamonds
description: This is a custom PP5723/1R watch case. Made of solid 18K rose gold and set with VS-grade natural T-shaped diamonds. If you own an authentic 240 movement, you can order an 18K gold case and install it yourself. You'll only need to spend a small amount on the movement; you won't have to spend a lot of money buying an original PP5723 from a store. This will save you a lot of money. Of course, you can also temporarily install a super clone 240 movement.
